txt_175: A message to you from the system founder
txt_177: Hello. I’ve seen excellent business owners build establishments worth millions of riyals, only to lose twenty to thirty clients a month in a ridiculous manner. Not due to poor service, but because a regular receptionist cannot respond immediately at midnight when a client needs help and messages the first 5 establishments on Google.
txt_178: Whoever responds first gets the client. This is the harsh truth of the market.
txt_179: The self-operating system I built is not just about "automated responses". It’s about protecting your establishment from the hidden daily bleed. The infrastructure takes care of responding, booking, and follow-ups — so you can wake up in the morning to see your schedule automatically filled.
txt_180: If you’re ready to stop the bleed in your business, click the button below to message me personally.
